LanguageData.ARA_IncubationSpeedFactor.label: Hatching speed
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationSpeedFactor.description: Hatching speed multiplier applied to the hatching tank.
LanguageData.NutrientTransmissionEfficiency.label: Biomass transfer losses
LanguageData.NutrientTransmissionEfficiency.descripti: Reduce fuel consumption when transferring biomass. The final consumption will be multiplied by (1 - efficiency).
LanguageData.ARA_Incubation_StatCategory.label: Incubation related data
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationCost.label: Nutrients needed for hatching
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationCost.description: Total nutrients required to hatch this armed organ/fabric
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationTime.label: Time required for incubation
LanguageData.ARA_IncubationTime.description: The time it takes to hatch the weapon/fabric
LanguageData.ARA_IcezKillingFactor.label: Freezing damage threshold
LanguageData.ARA_IcezKillingFactor.description: The proportion of blood volume required for body parts to be destroyed due to freezing due to freezing damage.
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltNetwork.label: cellular network
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidth.label: Cellular network capacity
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidth.description: The maximum node limit of the Arachne Swarm Gestalt network. Each Arachneid will affect the load of the network. Some Zergs will share the network pressure, while others will increase the load. When the load is too large, the Queen Arachne's mind will be oppressed, causing its mood and consciousness to decrease.
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidthCost.label: Cellular Network Load
LanguageData.ARA_GestaltBandwidthCost.description: If the load exerted by the Arachneid on the Gestalt network is negative, it means that this insect will share the pressure on the Gestalt network.
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Cooldown_Delay.label: Psychic Beam Cooldown Delay (Seconds)
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Cooldown_Delay.descriptio: When Arachne Breathing uses the Swarm's psionic ability, the psionic load generated will begin to gradually decrease after this time, and any spell cast will reset the cooldown.
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Level.label: Spell level
LanguageData.ARA_SwarmSpell_Level.description: The spell power of Arachne's psionic units.
